text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When it comes to training or anything else in life,
Tosen Jordan tackles things head-on and with
honesty.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not one to deny a sincere request for help, Biwa
Hayahide offers Jordan private instruction,
concluding with the ultimate secret to victory...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The race is upon us. Depending on who you ask,
Gold Ship is either not in the running at all or the
ultimate favorite to win.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But who cares about that?! She's still Tosen
Jordan's rival. It's time to decide who's the
number one dummy!
